full_content:
Slice 1 of GTKB-GOV-TERM-PRIMER-STARTUP per bridge gtkb-gov-term-primer-startup-2026-05-02-006.md (Codex GO).

Owner approval: AskUserQuestion at S327; owner answer 'Approve plan + proceed (Recommended)'.

Files affected by this batch (full diffs in the post-impl bridge -007):

1. groundtruth-kb/templates/rules/canonical-terminology.toml
   - ADD: required_primer_terms field per profile (4 profiles: local-only, dual-agent, dual-agent-webapp, harness-memory).
   - ADD: primer_missing_severity per profile.
   - ADD: primer_path = '.claude/rules/canonical-terminology.md' in [config.defaults].
   - PRESERVE: existing required_files, required_startup_terms, missing_severity semantics unchanged (per Codex -004 F1 option 1).

2. groundtruth-kb/templates/rules/canonical-terminology.md
   - PRESERVE: existing 8 ADR-0001 core term entries verbatim (MemBase, Deliberation Archive, MEMORY.md, Knowledge Database, GroundTruth KB, GT-KB, Prime Builder, Loyal Opposition).
   - ADD: §'GT-KB Platform & Lifecycle Terms' section with 16 new term entries: GTKB, platform, application, hosted application, Agent Red, adopter, project, work item, backlog, specification, requirement, implementation proposal, implementation report, verification, dashboard, bridge.
   - Each new entry uses existing format (Definition / Not to be confused with / Source / Implementation pointer).
   - Multi-source attribution per Codex -002 F3: sources are operating-model.md §2, AGENTS.md, role rules, DELIB-GTKB-IDP-TERMINOLOGY, CLAUDE.md § 'Application Identity'.

3. groundtruth-kb/src/groundtruth_kb/project/doctor.py
   - EXTEND: _check_canonical_terminology() to evaluate required_primer_terms against primer_path content (separate from existing required_startup_terms vs required_files semantics).
   - PRESERVE: existing required_startup_terms semantics unchanged.
   - Per Codex -004 F1 option 1.

4. .claude/rules/canonical-terminology.md (GT-KB checkout dogfood install)
   - CREATE: rendered from template-2 with {{PROJECT_NAME}} substituted to 'GroundTruth-KB'.

5. .claude/rules/canonical-terminology.toml (GT-KB checkout dogfood install)
   - CREATE: rendered from template-1.

6. groundtruth-kb/tests/test_doctor_canonical_terminology.py
   - EXTEND: add 5 new tests covering dual-contract semantics (T2, T6, T6b, T11, T17).

Acceptance criteria per bridge gtkb-gov-term-primer-startup-2026-05-02-005.md §'Acceptance Criteria'.

Deliverables verified via pytest + ruff prior to post-impl bridge filing.
explicit_change_request: Owner approved Primer Slice 1 implementation per detailed plan via AskUserQuestion at S327. Owner answer: 'Approve plan + proceed (Recommended)'. Plan included: TOML extension with required_primer_terms field, MD primer extension with 16 new terms + multi-source attribution, doctor.py extension for dual-contract evaluation, GT-KB checkout dogfood install, 5 new tests, single batch approval packet.
change_reason: Slice 1 of GTKB-GOV-TERM-PRIMER-STARTUP per bridge gtkb-gov-term-primer-startup-2026-05-02-006.md (Codex GO); install canonical-terminology surface for GT-KB checkout (dogfood) + extend term coverage to 22 owner-required terms.
